steps.name: project-scaffold
steps.summary: Spring Boot backend scaffold, Next.js frontend scaffold, Docker MySQL config, pytest config, and Harness executor tests were prepared and verified.

steps.name: backend-domain-foundation
steps.summary: Implemented backend JPA domain entities, repositories, global error handling, Seoul/UTC time utilities, question seed data, and backend foundation tests.

steps.name: backend-auth-session
steps.summary: Implemented Spring session-based auth APIs with BCrypt password hashing, localhost CORS credentials support, and backend auth/session tests.

steps.name: backend-couple-invites
steps.summary: Implemented couple creation and invite-join APIs with session-based ownership checks, 24-hour invite validation, and backend couple/invite tests.

steps.name: backend-daily-answers
steps.summary: Implemented Seoul-date today question assignment, locked/revealed answer response contract, and answer create/update APIs with backend tests.

steps.name: backend-diary-export
steps.summary: Implemented diary listing and export order backend APIs with session-scoped ownership checks, preview/complete/cancel/download state flow, snapshot downloads, and backend tests.

steps.name: frontend-app-shell-api
steps.summary: Implemented frontend app shell routes, reusable layout/UI primitives, typed Spring API clients with credentials include, and guard/api parsing tests.

steps.name: frontend-auth-couple
steps.summary: Implemented signup/login forms, logout entry, and couple invite create/join UI with route redirects, field-level errors, and frontend auth/couple flow tests.
